evidence.claim: Shipped personalization infrastructure including offline experimentation, A/B testing framework, and feature-engineering pipeline.
evidence.source_text: Shipped the personalization infrastructure: the system that learns from user behavior and improves relevance over time. Designed the offline experimentation environment, the online A/B testing framework, and the feature-engineering pipeline that connected them.

evidence.claim: Owned search and discovery experience end-to-end including data infrastructure and ranking algorithms.
evidence.source_text: Owned the search and discovery experience end-to-end at a consumer product, from how content is represented internally through to how the most relevant results appear for each user's intent. The work spanned data infrastructure, ranking algorithms, evaluation methodology

evidence.claim: Designed ranking layer for flagship product serving millions of items to millions of users.
evidence.source_text: Designed the ranking layer for the company's flagship product: how do we surface the right thing at the right time, across millions of items, for millions of users.

evidence.claim: Owned ranking layer, data pipeline, and evaluation framework for 14 months.
evidence.source_text: I owned all three [data pipeline, evaluation framework, operational discipline] across roughly 14 months.

evidence.claim: Designed and rolled out large-scale semantic search system for 35M+ items.
evidence.source_text: Owned the design and rollout of a large-scale semantic search system serving an internal corpus of 35M+ items.

evidence.claim: Migrated BM25 to hybrid sparse/dense vector search using sentence-transformers, MPNet-base, and BGE-large.
evidence.source_text: Migrated the existing BM25-only retrieval to a hybrid setup combining sparse and dense vectors (sentence-transformers, MPNet-base initially, later fine-tuned BGE-large for our domain).

evidence.claim: Reduced p95 retrieval latency by 60% and improved NDCG@10 by 18%.
evidence.source_text: The new system reduced p95 retrieval latency by 60% while improving NDCG@10 by 18% on our held-out eval set.

evidence.claim: Led a team of 4 engineers during a search system rollout.
evidence.source_text: Led a team of 4 engineers across the rollout.

evidence.claim: Prefers shipping real systems over research-only work; prioritizes v1 in 6 weeks over perfect v2 in 6 months.
evidence.source_text: Strong preference for shipping real systems over research-only work; I'd rather have a working v1 in 6 weeks than a perfect v2 in 6 months.

evidence.claim: Learned from past mistakes including over-engineering and optimizing metrics that don't correlate with online performance.
evidence.source_text: I've made the standard mistakes — over-engineering early, optimizing offline metrics that didn't move online numbers, building beautiful infrastructure for features that users didn't actually want — so I notice them faster now.
